name: Minimum Variance
description: Minimum Variance optimisation across all 13 assets: global equities (VUSA, EQQQ, AIGC, IIND, IMEU, IWRD), precious metals (SSLN, SGLN), commodities (COMM, BRNT, CRUD, WCOA), and bonds (VUTY). Quadratic optimisation (scipy SLSQP) finds the globally lowest-volatility portfolio. Long-only with weights summing to 1.
